task_completion.description: Verify that a local Docker registry (registry:2) is running on port 5000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output of 'docker ps' showing a container running the 'registry:2' image with port 5000 mapped, or the successful execution of a 'docker run -p 5000:5000 registry:2' command.

task_completion.description: Verify the API service image is built and pushed to the local registry with the v1.0.0 tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing 'docker push localhost:5000/api-service:v1.0.0' completing successfully, or 'docker images' listing 'localhost:5000/api-service' with tag 'v1.0.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify the API service image is built and pushed to the local registry with the latest tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing 'docker push localhost:5000/api-service:latest' completing successfully, or 'docker images' listing 'localhost:5000/api-service' with tag 'latest'.

task_completion.description: Verify a docker-compose.yml file is created at /home/ga/api-service/docker-compose.yml that uses the registry image and maps port 7080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output (e.g., 'cat docker-compose.yml') showing the file contents. It must contain 'image: localhost:5000/api-service:latest' (or v1.0.0) and a ports mapping for '7080'. It must NOT contain a 'build:' directive.

task_completion.description: Verify the API service is deployed and accessible on port 7080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output of 'docker-compose up' succeeding, 'docker ps' showing the api-service container running with port 7080 mapped, or a successful 'curl localhost:7080' command.

integrity.description: Ensure the docker-compose.yml file does not use a build directive.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the contents of the docker-compose.yml file to ensure there is no 'build: .' or similar directive; it must rely solely on the 'image:' directive.

integrity.description: Ensure the images were actually pushed to the local registry, not just tagged locally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the actual 'docker push' command execution and its progress/success output in the terminal, rather than just 'docker tag' commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent executed genuine docker and docker-compose commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for typical Docker CLI output formatting, progress bars, and layer hashes, ensuring the agent didn't just echo expected text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is located at /home/ga/api-service. The local registry must run on port 5000. The image must be named 'api-service' and pushed to 'localhost:5000/api-service' with two tags: 'v1.0.0' and 'latest'. The docker-compose.yml must expose the API on port 7080 and pull the image from the local registry (localhost:5000) without using a build directive.
